howToChangeVisit.title: How to change your visit
howToChangeVisit.contactPrisonPhone: To update your visit, call {{prisonName}} on {{phoneNumber}} between 9am and 5pm, Monday to Friday.
howToChangeVisit.contactPrisonWebsite: To update your visit, contact {{prisonName}} directly.
howToChangeVisit.visitReference: You will need the visit reference to make changes. Your visit reference is {{ visitReference }}.
howToChangeVisit.cancelVisit: Or you can cancel your visit from the visits page.

howToUpdateRequest.title: How to update your request
howToUpdateRequest.contactPrisonPhone: To update your request, call {{prisonName}} on {{phoneNumber}} between 9am and 5pm, Monday to Friday.
howToUpdateRequest.contactPrisonWebsite: To update your request, contact {{prisonName}} directly.
howToUpdateRequest.visitReference: You will need the visit reference to make changes. Your request reference is {{ visitReference }}.

visitingInfo.title: Prepare for visiting {{prisonName}}
visitingInfo.acceptableId: All visitors over 16 years old must show acceptable forms of ID to enter the prison.
visitingInfo.arriveEarly: Visitors should arrive 45 minutes before the visit starts.
visitingInfo.moreVisitsInfo: You can read more about visits at {{prisonName}}. This includes information on getting to the prison and visiting facilities.
visitingInfo.expectationsHeading: What to expect when visiting a prison
visitingInfo.search1: Visitors will be searched before entering the prison visiting room.
visitingInfo.search2: Prison staff may check visitors' pockets, pat them down and ask them to go through a metal detector. Dogs may also be used to detect illegal substances.
visitingInfo.helpWithCostHeading: Help with the cost of prison visits
visitingInfo.helpWithCostDetails: You may be able to get help with the cost of prison visits if you’re getting certain benefits or have a health certificate.
